_meta.description: JJ Property 10 — Ownership Engine Regression Dataset v1. Frozen. Do not edit. All future engine changes must produce identical outputs for every case in this file.
_meta.property_owners_table: NEVER REFERENCED — all ownership from partnership_ownership only
_meta.routing_flag: hasOwnershipRecords (boolean) is the sole financial routing signal
_meta.rounding: round2(n) = Math.round(n * 100) / 100, applied once per stage

Villa Mazotos 2._comment: projectBalance100 = -10000 (client_debt, closing_balance negated → client owes JJ)

G1_Avi_VillaMazotos._narrative: G1 — Avi invested in Villa Mazotos. He owns 50%. Project surplus €5,000. JJ pays Avi €2,500.

G2_JJ_VillaMazotos._narrative: G2 — JJ owns 50% of Villa Mazotos. JJ is undivided (no Yossi/Jacob sub-split). JJ internal credit €2,500.

G3_Oren_VillaMazotos2._narrative: G3 — Oren owns 35% of Villa Mazotos 2. Project is in debt (client_debt convention). Oren owes JJ €3,500.

per_account._note: owner_closing_balance = 3500 (35% of 10000) before convention flip. direction flag comes from ownerAdjustedBalance = -3500.

G4_JJ_VillaMazotos2._narrative: G4 — JJ owns 65% of Villa Mazotos 2. JJ carries €6,500 of the project debt. Oren (G3) + JJ (G4) = €10,000 full debt.

G5_Liron_TamirDekelia._narrative: G5 — Tamir Dekelia is a client property. No partnership_ownership rows. 100% passthrough. JJ pays Liron the full balance.

G6_JJ_MultiProperty._narrative: G6 — JJ portfolio: Villa Mazotos (+2500 credit) + Villa Mazotos 2 (-6500 debt). Net: JJ owes €4,000.
G6_JJ_MultiProperty.credit_debt_separation_invariant: credits and debts are summed independently before netting — never mixed mid-calculation

EC1_future_ownership_row_excluded._narrative: An ownership row with effective_from in the future must be excluded. Property falls back to 100% passthrough.

EC2_expired_ownership_row_excluded._narrative: An ownership row with effective_to in the past must be excluded.

EC3_boundary_effective_to_equals_referen._narrative: A row with effective_to exactly equal to referenceDate is still active (inclusive boundary).

EC4_unconfirmed_row_excluded._narrative: Rows with confirmation_status != 'confirmed' are excluded from ownership calculation.

EC5_settled_threshold._narrative: A balance of €0.004 rounds to 'settled', not payable_to_owner or payable_to_jj.

EC6_rounding_no_double_application._narrative: Ownership pct applied once in buildPropertySettlement. Portfolio layer sums pre-rounded values — no second application.
EC6_rounding_no_double_application.engine_path: buildOwnerAdjustedAccount (round2 per field) → buildPropertySettlement (round2 for ownerAdjustedBalance) → buildPortfolio (round2 for totals)
EC6_rounding_no_double_application.invariant: pct is never multiplied twice in any execution path

Villa Mazotos 2._note: B3 RESOLVED. Entry valuation, required capital, JJ margin, inception model all confirmed. Capital paid UNKNOWN — do not infer.

property_acquisition._note: Purchase price confirmed by Yossi 2026-07-13. Acquisition in progress. Closing costs TBD.

partner_entries._entryDate_note: Business rule CONFIRMED: from acquisition inception. Exact calendar date pending signed purchase contract. Status: confirmed_business_sequence_pending_exact_date.
partner_entries._capitalPaid_note: UNKNOWN — must not be inferred. Do not use deposit/brokerage rows (payer=Jacob) as Oren capital payments.

Villa Mazotos 2._capital_events_oren_note: No Oren capital events confirmed. Populate only after Yossi confirms Oren payment amounts and dates.

property_acquisition._note: closingCosts approximate until Yossi confirms all cost rows. Use purchasePrice only for JJ margin approximation.

capital_events_avi._note: Avi paid seller directly — his 50% of the €400K purchase price

capital_events_avi.businessSource: Yossi-approved historical correction of legacy DB row (2024-06-16, Owner→Yossi). Legacy row recorded €30,000 — known historical data error. Approved authoritative amount: €50,000.
capital_events_avi._note: PARTNER-ENTRY CAPITAL — not JJ operating income. DB row currently mis-classified as category=JJ Income with wrong amount (€30K). Future correction: void/supersede legacy row; insert this event for €50,000. Do NOT create two events (€30K + €20K).

_legacy_correction.correction_model: void-and-replace: one event of €50,000 referencing legacy row as audit source

G7_Avi_EntryCapital_VillaMazotos._narrative: G7 — Avi's partner entry in Villa Mazotos. Entry valuation €500K, ownership 50%, required capital €250K. Two payments: €200K (seller) + €50K (Yossi). Fully paid. Confirmed 2026-07-13.

G8_JJ_InternalMargin_VillaMazotos._narrative: G8 — JJ internal capital economics from Avi's entry. totalJJCost=€400K (purchase price, approx). Avi paid €250K for his 50%. JJ margin=€50K, netAtRisk=€150K. NEVER shown to Avi.
G8_JJ_InternalMargin_VillaMazotos._confidentiality: JJ INTERNAL ONLY — excluded from all partner-facing output
G8_JJ_InternalMargin_VillaMazotos._totalJJCost_note: Approximate — excludes closing costs (~€14.3K). Exact margin slightly lower (~€42.9K) once costs confirmed.
G8_JJ_InternalMargin_VillaMazotos.visibility_rule: jjInternal fields MUST NOT appear in PartnerInvestmentReport or any partner-facing delivery

G9_BillableEvent_Renovation_Avi50pct._narrative: G9 — Renovation billable event on Villa Mazotos. ActualCost=€10,000, ClientCharge=€13,000. Avi (50%) is billed €6,500. JJ margin from Avi=€1,500. JJ margin is NEVER shown to Avi.
G9_BillableEvent_Renovation_Avi50pct.visibility_rule: investorShare_clientCharge → partner-facing ✅. investorShare_actualCost + jjMarginFromInvestor → JJ internal only ❌

G9b_BillableEvent_Renovation_Oren35pct._narrative: G9b — Same renovation event, Oren (35% in Villa Mazotos 2). Oren billed €4,550. JJ margin from Oren=€1,050.

G10_FullLifecycleSummary_Avi._narrative: G10 — Full Investment Lifecycle Summary for Avi on Villa Mazotos. Entry fully paid. Operations balance +€2,500 (from G1 settlement engine). Net position = +€2,500.

G11_VoidAndReplace_AviLegacyCorrection._narrative: G11 — Known historical data correction: Avi's installment-2 (to Yossi) was recorded as €30,000 in legacy data. Approved authoritative amount: €50,000. This is not an unexplained gap — it is a known wrong historical value. Correction model: preserve legacy row, mark superseded, create one authoritative event for €50,000. Do NOT create two events (€30K + €20K).

legacy_db_row.description: אבי נתן ליוסי רווח מהווילה מזוטוס
legacy_db_row._known_error: Wrong amount (€30K instead of €50K) AND wrong category (JJ Income instead of partner-entry capital)

legacy_row.voidReason: Historical data error. Approved authoritative amount is €50,000 (Yossi-approved 2026-07-13). Also mis-classified as JJ Income — correct classification: Villa Mazotos partner-entry capital.

replacement_event.businessSource: Yossi approval 2026-07-13: authoritative amount €50,000; partner-entry capital for Villa Mazotos
replacement_event._note: supersedesEventId auto-set by createReplacementCapitalEvent(). One event — not two.

expected._key_invariant: One approved payment of €50,000. Not two payments (€30K + €20K). Legacy €30K is just the wrong historical value for the same event.
expected._audit_invariant: DELETE is never used. The legacy €30K row remains permanently for audit trail, marked voided/superseded.

G13_AviInception_VillaMazotos._narrative: G13 — Avi's inception participation in Villa Mazotos. Avi entered from acquisition start — not one week later, not one month later. His 50% covers all lifecycle economics from day one. Business rule confirmed 2026-07-13. Exact calendar date pending signed contract.
G13_AviInception_VillaMazotos._key_invariant: System must never fabricate a delayed entry date from payment timing or transaction evidence. Only a signed document can establish a date different from acquisition start.
G13_AviInception_VillaMazotos._test_assertion: Any report that shows a JJ-only period for Villa Mazotos before Avi's entry is architecturally incorrect and must fail this test case.

G14_OrenEntry_VillaMazotos2._narrative: G14 — Oren's partner entry in Villa Mazotos 2. Entry valuation €520K (≠ purchase price €400K). Ownership 35%. Required capital €182K. JJ entry margin €42K (internal only, never shown to Oren). Capital paid UNKNOWN — must not be inferred. Oren from inception. Confirmed 2026-07-13.
G14_OrenEntry_VillaMazotos2._confidentiality: jjMarginFromOrenEntry, jjCostBasisForOren, jjNetAtRisk must NEVER appear in partner-facing output.
_key_invariants: agreedEntryValuation (€520K) and purchasePrice (€400K) are independent confirmed facts — no forced arithmetic relationship
jjMarginFromOrenEntry (€42K) is computed at reporting time, never stored in capital_event ledger, never shown to Oren
capital_paid is UNKNOWN — system must return UNKNOWN/null, not zero, not inferred amount
Do not use Jacob's deposit (€10K) or brokerage (€3K) rows as Oren capital events without explicit Yossi confirmation

G12_AviPortfolio_SingleProperty._narrative: G12 — Avi's investment portfolio view. One property (Villa Mazotos). Net position +€2,500. Portfolio aggregation applies same logic as multi-property, with one entry.

G15_VacancyCost_VillaMazotos._narrative: G15 — Vacancy cost during empty period. JJ pays €800 actual costs; no ClientCharge (pass-through at actual). Avi 50%. JJ margin = €0 when CC = €0. OQ-1 resolution.

formula_verification.owner_charge: 0 × 50 / 100 = 0 (CC=0 → no billing; owner_charge = CC × pct only if CC > 0, else pass-through cost = actual_cost × pct = 400)
formula_verification._note: When CC=0, owner_charge = actual_cost × pct. JJ margin = (CC − actual_cost) × pct = (0 − 800) × 0.5 = −400 is not a margin — it means JJ absorbs nothing; owner pays 50%.

_key_invariants: JJ does not absorb any partner cost share
When CC = €0, jj_margin = €0 (not negative; cost is passed through directly)
owner_charge = actual_cost × pct when CC = €0

G16_LTRManagementFee_VillaMazotos._narrative: G16 — LTR Management Fee. Same Billable Event model as Renovation/Airbnb. Cost=€0 (no sub-contractor). CC=€200 agreed monthly mgmt fee. Avi 50%. JJ margin=€100 (internal only). OQ-2 resolution.
_key_invariants: Same Billable Event model as Renovation and Airbnb
actual_cost, client_charge, owner_charge, owner_cost_share, jj_margin are all separate fields
jj_margin (€100) is internal and must never appear in partner-facing output

G17_Refinance_NoOwnershipChange_VillaMaz._narrative: G17 — Refinance without ownership change. JJ refinances Villa Mazotos; bank provides €100K. Avi's 50% unchanged. No new partner. OQ-3 resolution: capital_event only; no new ownership_period.
_key_invariants: Refinance creates a capital_event only
No new ownership_period unless ownership actually changes
Existing ownership records remain valid and unchanged

G18_Distribution_PartialPayment_VillaMaz._narrative: G18 — Settlement Engine owes Avi €2,500 (ownerAdjustedBalance). JJ pays only €2,000. Outstanding €500 remains. OQ-5 resolution: Settlement ≠ Distribution/Payment.
_key_invariants: Settlement Engine output (what is owed) is never modified by payments
Distribution Payment is a separate capital_event record (event_type = distribution_payment)
Outstanding balance = Settlement − ΣDistribution Payments
Primitive 6 (Settlement) and Primitive 7 (Distribution/Payment) are never merged

G19_P9_OneCanonicalEvent_VillaMazotos._narrative: G19 — P9 canonical event test. Avi wires €50K to Yossi (installment 2). One bank transfer = one canonical capital_event. Must not be duplicated across primitives. Legacy €30K row is voided; replacement at €50K created.
_key_invariants: One economic movement = one canonical event
P9: one movement → one canonical event → many read-only projections
Voided events remain in DB permanently (void-and-replace immutability)
capitalPaid = €250K counted exactly once after correction

G20_ExternalBuyout_NoJJCapitalEvent_Vill._narrative: G20 — Avi sells 50% directly to David (new investor). JJ is not a financial party. No JJ capital_event. Two ownership_period records change. OQ-6 resolution: external_transfer subtype.
_key_invariants: External transfer: no JJ capital_event
Only two Ownership Events: Avi closes, David opens
JJ's 50% stake is unchanged
JJ capital_event is created ONLY if JJ was a financial party to the transfer

validation_rules._description: 28 invariants that must hold across all golden cases. Rules 1-8: Settlement Engine (G1-G6). Rules 9-20: Investment Lifecycle (G7-G12). Rules 21-22: Inception + Oren facts (G13-G14). Rules 23-28: OQ resolutions (G15-G20).

rules.name: ownership_pct_applied_once
rules.assertion: ownerAdjustedBalance === round2(projectBalance100 × ownershipPct / 100)

rules.name: passthrough_when_no_ownership_records
rules.assertion: !hasOwnershipRecords → ownershipPct === 100 && ownerAdjustedBalance === projectBalance100

rules.name: hasOwnershipRecords_is_sole_routing_flag
rules.assertion: entity_type is never used to change calculation path — only hasOwnershipRecords

rules.name: portfolio_credits_debts_separated
rules.assertion: totalOwnerCredits and totalOwnerDebts computed independently before netting

rules.name: jj_undivided_in_settlement
rules.assertion: No Yossi/Jacob sub-split appears in ownership engine; JJ treated as one entity

rules.name: effective_date_filtering
rules.assertion: Rows with effective_from > referenceDate or effective_to < referenceDate are excluded from ownership lookup

rules.name: only_confirmed_rows_used
rules.assertion: confirmation_status must equal 'confirmed' for any row to affect calculation

rules.name: balance_convention_flip_before_pct
rules.assertion: client_debt convention negation is applied in computeProjectBalance100 BEFORE ownership pct multiplication

rules.name: entry_valuation_not_derived_from_purchase_price
rules.assertion: agreedEntryValuation must be sourced independently from purchasePrice — they have no required arithmetic relationship. Confirmed: €500K ≠ €400K for Villa Mazotos / Avi.

rules.name: required_capital_derived_from_entry_valuation
rules.assertion: requiredEntryCapital === round2(agreedEntryValuation × ownershipPct / 100)

rules.name: capital_remaining_floor_zero
rules.assertion: capitalRemaining === Math.max(0, round2(requiredEntryCapital - capitalPaid))

rules.name: is_entry_fully_paid
rules.assertion: isEntryFullyPaid === (capitalPaid >= requiredEntryCapital)

rules.name: capital_paid_excludes_voided_events
rules.assertion: capitalPaid = sum(amountEur) for all capital_payment events where voided = false for this partner

rules.name: jj_margin_from_entry_formula
rules.assertion: jjMarginFromEntry === round2(requiredEntryCapital - (totalJJCost × ownershipPct / 100))

rules.name: jj_net_capital_at_risk
rules.assertion: jjNetCapitalAtRisk === round2(totalJJCost - requiredEntryCapital)

rules.name: investor_share_client_charge
rules.assertion: investorShare_clientCharge === round2(clientCharge × ownershipPct / 100)

rules.name: investor_share_actual_cost
rules.assertion: investorShare_actualCost === round2(actualCost × ownershipPct / 100)

rules.name: jj_margin_from_billable_event
rules.assertion: jjMarginFromInvestor === round2((clientCharge - actualCost) × ownershipPct / 100)

rules.name: void_and_replace_no_delete
rules.assertion: voided events remain in DB permanently. supersedesEventId links replacement to voided. createReplacementCapitalEvent() auto-sets supersedesEventId. For known historical data errors (e.g. legacy €30K → authoritative €50K): ONE corrected event created; do NOT split into two events (€30K + €20K) to account for the difference.

rules.name: net_position_formula
rules.assertion: netPosition === round2(ownerAdjustedBalance + totalDistributions - capitalRemaining) when ownerAdjustedBalance is not null

rules.name: inception_participation_no_fabricated_delay
rules.assertion: When entry is confirmed_business_sequence_pending_exact_date from acquisition inception: ownership_effective_from = acquisition contract date. System must not infer a later date from payment timing. pre_partner_jj_only_period must not be generated.

rules.name: unknown_capital_paid_returns_null_not_zero
rules.assertion: When capitalPaid is UNKNOWN (no confirmed capital_payment events exist), capitalPaid = null (not 0). capitalRemaining = null (not requiredEntryCapital). isEntryFullyPaid = null (not false). System must not infer from transaction rows without explicit Yossi confirmation.

rules.name: vacancy_cost_passthrough_no_jj_absorption
rules.assertion: When CC=0, owner_charge = actual_cost × ownershipPct. JJ does not absorb any partner cost share. jj_margin = 0 when CC = 0.

rules.name: ltr_same_billable_event_model
rules.assertion: LTR Management Fee uses identical Billable Event fields as Renovation/Airbnb: actual_cost, client_charge, owner_charge, owner_cost_share, jj_margin. JJ does not invoice itself. jj_margin is internal-only.

rules.name: refinance_capital_event_only_no_ownership_period
rules.assertion: Refinance creates capital_event (type=refinance_capital_event) only. No new ownership_period record unless ownership actually changes as a result of the refinance.

rules.name: settlement_not_modified_by_distribution_payment
rules.assertion: Settlement Engine output (what is owed) is immutable once computed. Distribution Payment is a separate capital_event. outstanding_balance = settlement_owed − sum(distribution_payment events). Partial payments supported. Primitive 6 ≠ Primitive 7.

rules.name: p9_one_movement_one_canonical_event
rules.assertion: One economic movement creates exactly one canonical event. The same money may not appear in two different primitive records. Accounting evidence row is linked via linked_accounting_transaction_id; the lifecycle capital_event is the canonical record.

rules.name: external_transfer_no_jj_capital_event
rules.assertion: When buyout_type = 'external_transfer': no JJ capital_event is created. Only ownership_period records change. JJ capital_event is created ONLY when JJ is a financial party (buyout_type = 'internal_buyout').

confidentiality_rules._description: These fields must NEVER appear in partner-facing output

regression_policy.changelog: v1.0 (2026-07-13): G1-G6 + EC1-EC6. v1.1 (2026-07-13): Added G7-G12 (Investment Lifecycle layer) + 20 validation rules + confidentiality rules. Confirmed Avi facts: €500K entry valuation, €250K required capital, €250K paid, €0 remaining. v1.2 (2026-07-13): Added G13 (Avi inception participation — from acquisition start, no pre-Avi JJ period) + G14 (Oren VM2 entry: €520K val, €182K required, €42K JJ premium internal, capitalPaid UNKNOWN). lifecycle_inputs for Villa Mazotos 2 added. Validation rules 21-22 added (inception + unknown capitalPaid). B2+B3 confirmed. v1.3 (2026-07-13): Added G15-G20 (OQ-1 vacancy, OQ-2 LTR mgmt fee, OQ-3 refinance, OQ-5 distribution vs payment, P9 canonical event, OQ-6 external buyout). Validation rules 23-28 added. 28 total invariants. All OQ resolutions locked.
required_for: Any change to round2() or the settled threshold
Any change to the balance_convention logic
Any DB schema change to entity_registry or partnership_ownership
Any new account_type added to RC3
Any change to buildPartnerFacingReport() or buildJJInternalReport()
Any change to createCapitalEvent() or createReplacementCapitalEvent()
Any change to the billable event / ClientCharge computation
Any change to computeVacancyCost() or cost pass-through logic
Any change to computeLTRManagementFee() or LTR Billable Event model
Any change to Settlement Engine output or distribution_payment recording
Any change to P9 canonical event creation or linking logic
Any change to external_transfer or internal_buyout ownership routing
regression_policy.how_to_run: Execute src/__tests__/lifecycle/lifecycleDomain.test.ts (G7-G20) and src/__tests__/ownership/goldenCases.test.ts (G1-G6). All 28 validation rules must hold. If any expected value in this file changes, the change must be approved by Yossi and committed with a new dataset version before merging.
regression_policy.versioning: When cases are added or expected values change, increment dataset version (v1.x → v1.x+1) and document the reason in changelog.
